strong.function: Respiratory system, dispersal, outward energy projection, exhaling and releasing

weak.function: Energy storage, absorption, nutrient accumulation, inward gathering

organ_balance.note: In SCM, organs refer to functional systems, not strict anatomical organs. Lung = dispersal/respiratory function. Liver = storage/absorption function.

body_characteristics.build: Tends toward a strong upper body with a prominent nape and chest area; lower body may be relatively less developed
body_characteristics.head_neck: Well-developed nape region; strong, upright posture
body_characteristics.metabolism: High dispersal energy; difficulty retaining and storing nutrients
vulnerabilities: Digestive weakness in the lower gastrointestinal tract

personality.seong_innate: Creative, visionary, ambitious, socially outward-reaching. Strong sense of justice and bold in action.
personality.jeong_emotion: Prone to deep sadness that can turn to anger. Intense leadership energy.

protective_factors: Regular gentle exercise for lower body

diet.ginseng_reason: Ginseng is a powerfully warming herb that raises internal heat. Tae-Yang already has maximum Yang energy — adding ginseng can cause severe headaches, hypertension, nosebleeds, and dangerous heat accumulation.
diet.thermal_principle: Prioritize cool and cold-natured foods to counterbalance the inherently hot constitution

skincare.skin_tendency: May experience heat-related skin issues; skin can be dry due to high dispersal energy depleting moisture
skincare.routine_principle: Focus on hydration, cooling, and calming. Avoid heating or stimulating formulas.

beneficial.name: Ogapi (오가피)
beneficial.action: Strengthens lower body without adding heat

avoid.name: Insam (인삼)
avoid.reason: Excessively warming; dangerous for this constitution

avoid.name: Gyepi (계피)
avoid.reason: Warming herb that adds heat to already hot constitution

research_notes.rarity: Tae-Yang is the rarest type, comprising less than 1% of the Korean population. Some researchers debate whether it exists as a distinct clinical entity due to extremely low prevalence.
research_notes.genetic: Limited genetic studies exist due to small sample sizes. The rarity makes large-scale research challenging.
research_notes.heritability: Overall SCM type heritability estimated at 41–55% based on twin studies (2019).
